title: helichrysum tenax
intro: Helichrysum tenax, also known as Immortelle, is a perennial flowering plant in the sunflower family native to the alpine regions of the Mediterranean, specifically in France and Greece. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties, derived from its essential oils, particularly sesquiterpene lactones and flavonoids. The health benefits of Helichrysum tenax include reducing inflammation, improving wound healing, and protecting against oxidative stress, among others. Helichrysum tenax is commonly used in herbal preparations, such as essential oils, tinctures, and topical creams, to promote skin health, reduce scarring, and soothe digestive issues.
